title: Animal Planet Waffle Makers / 3 in 1 Animal Shaped Waffle Iron/Cool Touch Handle/Non-Stick Coating/Cord Storage/Anti-Slip Feet (Safari)
features: WAFFLE MAKER – This waffle maker is the perfect kitchen appliance to provide you with sweet or savoury homemade treats in just a matter of minutes. You can make a variety of three animal waffles in one batch.

3 FUN ANIMAL SHAPES – Enjoy a special family breakfast time with this waffle maker that makes up to 3 animal shapes per batch. Kids can have fun as they decorate their tasty waffle creations with all their favourite toppings.

WAFFLES YOUR WAY – Create delicious waffles to your liking and experiment trying out new flavour combinations! You’ll know when the machine is ready to be used thanks to the power and ready light indicators on top of the machine.

COOL TOUCH & NON-STICK – This waffle maker features a cool touch handle that makes the opening and closing of the lid safe during use and is simple to clean thanks to the non-stick hot plates. The appliance has cord storage to free up space when not in use and will stay secure on your worktop thanks to its non-slip rubber feet.

ANIMAL PLANET – The only animal entertainment brand with international reach, Animal Planet captures the compelling characters of the animal kingdom while encouraging learning, exploration, and fun. View the full range of products at the Animal Planet Amazon page.
description: Product Description Safari Waffle Maker Make 3 Animal Shapes Easily whip up sweet or savoury treats in a matter of minutes with this safari animal waffle maker. You can make up to 3 fun safari animal shapes per batch. Kids will be entertained as they decorate their tasty waffle creations with all their favourite toppings. You’ll know when the machine is ready to be used thanks to the power and ready light indicators on top of the machine. The appliance is easy to clean thanks to the non-stick hot plates and features a cool touch handle that makes the opening and closing of the lid safe during use. It has cord storage to free up space when not in use and will stay secure on your worktop thanks to its non-slip rubber feet. KEY FEATURES: Makes 3 Animal Shapes Non-Stick Cool Touch Handle Ready Light Indicator Cord Storage 3 ANIMAL SHAPES Make lion, giraffe, and elephant-shaped waffles. EFFICIENT & EASY TO USE Simple to use, clean, and store away when not in use. FAMILY BREAKFAST TIME Bring the whole family together at breakfast time. Ingredients: 240ml buttermilk 1/2 tsp salt 60g unsalted butter (melted) 1 tbsp caster sugar 1/2 tsp vanilla extract 1/2 tsp baking powder 1 large egg 1/4 tsp bicarb of soda 240g plain flour A little cooking oil Classic Mini Animal Shaped Belgian Waffles Makes 6 Waffles Method 1. Whisk the buttermilk, melted butter, and vanilla in a large mixing bowl. Separate the egg then whisk the yolk into the mixture. In a separate bowl, mix the egg white until it forms stiff peaks. This step helps keep the waffles light & fluffy. 2. Sift the dry ingredients into a separate mixing bowl. Add the wet mixture from earlier, combining until you have a smooth batter. Then carefully fold in the egg white. When combined, cover with cling film and leave for 30 minutes (optional).
